title: FDMPack
description: Vanilla modpack for playing on private server FDMine.
body:
Welcome to the **FDMine Modpack** — a carefully assembled collection made for players of the private FDMine server. This modpack is perfect for those who value performance, visual enhancements, and a smooth Minecraft experience while staying close to the vanilla style.


### Why Choose FDMine Modpack?
- **Performance Optimizations**
- With mods like Sodium, the FDMine modpack focuses on delivering a lag-free experience, improving frame rates, and making the game run more smoothly, especially on lower-end systems.

- **Enhanced Visuals**
- Featuring the KSEPSP resource pack, the modpack upgrades Minecraft's visuals without straying too far from its original charm. Check out the resource pack here: [KSEPSP](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ksepsp-v9-optifine-cit/).


### What’s Included?
- **PlasmoVoice**
- Seamlessly integrated voice chat allows for real-time communication with other players, adding depth and interaction to your multiplayer adventures.
- **EmoteCraft**
- Express yourself in the game with animations, poses, and emotes. On the FDMine server, these features work flawlessly, allowing other players to see your moves in action.
- **BACAP Language Pack**
- Enjoy over 1,000 achievements from the BlazeandCave advancement pack, fully localized to enhance your progression and exploration in Minecraft.


### Designed for the Best Experience

**The FDMine Modpack is built to improve your gameplay by:**
- **Optimizing Performance:** Ensuring the game runs smoothly with minimal hardware requirements.
- **Improving Visual Quality:** Creating a better-looking Minecraft world with minimal performance trade-offs.
- **Enhancing Multiplayer Interaction:** Supporting server-side features like voice chat and emotes for a richer community experience.


Whether you’re exploring the FDMine server or creating your own adventures, this modpack provides a polished and reliable Minecraft experience.
